Patent App No. 2025/0540 Pre-Revenue Seeking €5M Founding Round Navan, Ireland
// 01 — The Problem
Traffic congestion is caused by
interruptions to traffic flow.

Urban transport systems are fundamentally inefficient because infrastructure forces vehicles into repeated stop, slow and go cycles. Each braking event dissipates stored kinetic energy — both linear and rotational — as heat. Restarting then requires engines to operate at their least efficient point, burning excess fuel to overcome inertia and rebuild momentum.

At 12% engine efficiency at cold launch — every joule of momentum released at a junction required eight joules of fuel to create. The junction does not waste one unit. It wastes eight — then demands eight more.
Associated costs of every stop
  • Time — Lost productivity, wasted personal time, unreliable journeys
  • Fuel & Energy — Repeated acceleration, momentum loss, inefficient operation
  • Air Quality — NOx peaks at cold acceleration, brake and tyre particulates
  • Safety — High conflict points, highest accident concentration
  • Urban Heat — Brake and exhaust heat dumped into dense environments
  • Supply Chain — Every freight delay cascades through entire networks
  • Carbon — Avoidable emissions, no recovery of released momentum
Vehicle technology has advanced. Crossing logic has not.
Stopping and delay are presently designed into the system.

// 03 — The Solution — Bear Crossing
FLANKING COMMERCIAL POD — PEDESTRIAN LEVEL · GUARANTEED FOOTFALL · ZERO LAND COST BEAR CROSSING · RENDER
Pedestrians under.
Traffic never stops.

Umpireal's Bear Crossing routes pedestrians and crossing traffic below grade using precision-engineered precast modular units. Main flow vehicles never decelerate. The braking event never occurs. The Momentum Tax is eliminated.

This is not energy recovery. Momentum is never released as waste heat in the first place. It works for every vehicle — petrol, diesel, hybrid, EV, hydrogen, autonomous — from day one, regardless of age or technology.

WHY OTHERS FAIL
  • Smart signals — Reduce stops 8–20%. The stop remains.
  • Regenerative EV — Recovers 40–60% of KE. Re-acceleration losses persist.
  • Autonomous vehicles — Optimise approach. The conflict remains.
  • 25 years Euro standards — 90% → 87% waste. 3 points in a quarter century.
Why Umpireal is categorically different
Technology agnostic
Every vehicle benefits equally from day one — petrol, diesel, EV, hydrogen, autonomous
Universal and immediate
1.4 billion vehicles benefit on day one of installation
Permanent
50–100 year infrastructure — every future vehicle generation benefits automatically
Self-financing
Flanking commercial floor space funds each node independently — no subsidy
Passive
No power input, no moving parts, no operational cost once built
Patent protected
App No. 2025/0540 — the geometry insight is the moat
// 04 — The Asset — Every Node Is a Revenue-Generating Building
The under-crest volume becomes valuable real estate
for people, business, mobility and infrastructure.

Each Bear Crossing node creates fully habitable, lettable floor space from day one. The double-shell architecture provides a thermally stable, vibration-dampened environment for critical utilities and commercial uses — converting transport corridors into high-value multi-functional assets.

// 06 — Corporate Structure — The Jurisdiction Play
Umpireal Ireland HQ collects from all regional companies.
Every node. Every region. In perpetuity.

Umpireal Ireland Ltd holds the master IP — incorporated in Ireland at 12.5% corporation tax, with the Knowledge Development Box potentially reducing effective IP royalty tax to 6.25%. Regional companies licence and deploy. Councils contribute land against a 33% profit share replacing all ground lease, rates and levies.

€160,000 per node flows to Umpireal Ireland HQ — licence royalty €80k + IP design €50k + carbon credits €25k + force majeure reserve €5k. Collected from every node in every region globally.

// 07 — Deployment Model & Investment Thesis
A one-time global investment of €505B
permanently eliminates a $6 trillion
annual problem.
202,000 Bear Crossing nodes — one at every busy arterial junction globally — eliminates stop-start traffic congestion entirely. The full deployment cost of €505B is less than 9% of the annual cost it eliminates. At the current rate of global congestion losses, the entire investment pays back in 61 days. Every day after that is pure recovery.

01 — Pilot100€250M2.5 TWh

03 — National20,000€50B494 TWh
04 — Global202,000€505B5,000 TWh
Phase 1 — 100 nodes for €250M — fundable from the founding round alone. Generates verified traffic and emissions data to unlock EIC Accelerator funding (up to €17.5M), Series A and municipal procurement at scale. Self-funding from Phase 2 onwards.

FOUNDER LOAN DISCLOSURE
Alan Ledwith invested four years of full-time commitment commencing 15 April 2022 without salary. At €700/day the documented founder deferred salary loan is €950,000, formally recognised on the company balance sheet from incorporation. Partial recovery of €500,000 from founding round proceeds.
